name: Construct Mapping review for Validity Conditions Claim Hardening Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged claim updates distinguish realism, authenticity, comparator, model/workflow, prompt/workflow, item-difficulty, and scorer-validation constructs. SMART is mapped as scoring-adjacent item-development evidence, not final scorer validation.

findings.claim_or_issue: The support entries do not collapse synthetic-response realism into scorer validity or real-response interchangeability.
findings.why_it_matters: The claim updates should harden the graph without broadening the validity conclusion beyond the source evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the explicit limitations attached to each new support entry.
